item.title: 麦卡菲在软件领域迅速获胜，并回购债券
item.description: 据知情人士透露，麦卡菲公司趁软件行业暴跌导致其债务价值下跌之际，以折扣价回购了约2.87亿美元的无担保票据。【原文：McAfee bought back about $287 million of unsecured notes at a discount, taking advantage of a software rout that hit its debt stack, according to people familiar with the situation.】

item.title: 威兹航空首席执行官认为中东旅行需求正转向欧洲
item.description: 匈牙利廉价航空公司Wizz Air Holdings Plc的负责人表示，伊朗战争将使更多旅行需求从中东转向欧洲，因为乘客仍担心被困在该地区受空域限制影响而行动受限的海湾航空公司航班上。【原文：The war in Iran will shift more travel demand out of the Middle East and into Europe as passengers remain wary about getting stuck by Gulf airlines hamstrung by airspace restrictions in their region, the head of Hungarian discount carrier Wizz Air Holdings Plc said.】

item.title: 欧洲央行委员施纳贝尔称新预测将部分反映伊朗战争影响
item.description: 欧洲央行执行委员会成员伊莎贝尔·施纳贝尔表示，该行最新季度预测将部分纳入伊朗战争的经济影响。【原文：The European Central Bank’s new quarterly forecasts will partly incorporate the economic impact of the war in Iran, according to Executive Board member Isabel Schnabel.】

item.title: 马克龙称将在未来几天组织释放石油储备
item.description: 法国总统马克龙表示，七国集团和国际能源署成员国将在未来几天组织从紧急石油储备中释放最多4亿桶石油。【原文：The Group of Seven nations and IEA member countries will organize the discharge of a maximum of 400 million barrels from emergency oil reserves in the coming days, French President Emmanuel Macron said.】

item.title: 医疗科技公司史赛克遭黑客攻击，亲伊朗组织宣称负责
item.description: 据知情人士透露，医疗技术制造商史赛克公司遭遇黑客攻击，导致其全球运营陷入瘫痪。彭博新闻社获得的一份备忘录证实了这一情况。【原文：Medical technology maker Stryker Corp. was hacked in an attack that’s crippled the company’s global operations, according to a person familiar with the matter and a memo seen by Bloomberg News.】

item.title: 阿尔达格CDS持有人在结算拍卖后将获得66%的赔付
item.description: 在债务重组后，爱尔兰包装企业Ardagh Group SA的无担保债券持有人接管了该公司，其信用违约互换持有人将获得面值66%的赔付。【原文：Holders of Ardagh Group SA’s credit default swaps are set for a payout worth 66% of face value following a debt restructuring that saw unsecured bondholders take over the Irish packaging firm.】

item.title: BNP、Bradesco、荷兰合作银行被列为Raízen的主要债权人之一
item.description: 法国巴黎银行、巴西布拉德斯科银行和荷兰合作银行是巴西糖业与乙醇企业雷森公司最大的债权人之一。该公司正寻求通过庭外和解重组约126亿美元债务。【原文：BNP Paribas, Banco Bradesco SA and Coöperatieve Rabobank are among the largest creditors of Brazilian sugar and ethanol company Raízen SA, which is seeking to restructure some $12.6 billion of debt out-of-court.】

item.title: 智利新总统将迅速与特朗普政府保持一致
item.description: 智利刚刚就职的右翼总统将迅速表明其意图，使这个铜矿资源丰富的国家与美国总统唐纳德·特朗普领导的政府保持更紧密的协调。【原文：Chile just inaugurated a right-wing president who will quickly signal his intention to bring the copper-rich country into closer alignment with the administration of US head of state Donald Trump.】

item.title: 页岩行业高管称天然气热潮将引发美国压裂设备短缺
item.description: 美国顶级钻井承包商负责人表示，随着美国天然气出口量攀升以及国内对发电厂燃料需求的激增，本十年后期将出现压裂设备短缺现象。【原文：Rising US natural gas exports and soaring domestic demand for the power-plant fuel will lead to a shortage of fracking gear later this decade, according to the head of one the country’s top drilling contractors.】

item.title: 欧佩克数据显示俄罗斯2月原油产量进一步下滑
item.description: 俄罗斯原油产量在2月份连续第三个月下滑，凸显了美国制裁的影响，同时乌克兰无人机袭击也抑制了国内石油加工活动。【原文：Russia’s crude output declined for a third consecutive month in February, underlining the impact of US sanctions and as Ukrainian drone strikes curb domestic oil-processing.】

item.title: 软银支持的PayPay据称计划以每股16美元在美国上市
item.description: 知情人士透露，日本数字钱包提供商PayPay公司正向投资者透露，其在美国首次公开募股的定价将为每股16美元，低于此前预告的区间。尽管市场动荡，该交易仍在推进。【原文：Japanese digital-wallet provider PayPay Corp. is guiding investors that it will price its US initial public offering at $16 per share, below its marketed range, people familiar with the matter said, as the deal moves forward despite market turbulence.】

item.title: 欧洲紧急采取措施遏制中东战争引发的物价下跌
item.description: 欧洲各国政府正紧急采取措施遏制能源和食品价格上涨，因中东战争可能引发新一轮通胀压力。【原文：European governments are rushing to stem rising energy and food prices as the Middle East war threatens another wave of inflationary pressure.】

item.title: 谷歌支持Animaj工作室利用人工智能为YouTube儿童用户制作内容
item.description: 谷歌正投资一家人工智能内容工作室，专注于为YouTube制作儿童视频，此举旨在为该平台最年轻的用户群体提供优质内容。【原文：Google is investing in an artificial intelligence content studio focused on making videos for children on YouTube, part of an effort to seed the platform with high quality viewing for the site’s youngest users.】

item.title: 国际能源署将从储备中释放创纪录的4亿桶石油
item.description: 国际能源署同意从紧急石油储备中释放4亿桶原油，这是该机构有史以来规模最大的释放行动。各国政府正试图遏制因中东战争引发的能源价格飙升。【原文：The International Energy Agency agreed to discharge 400 million barrels from emergency oil reserves, its largest-ever release, as governments seek to contain a spike in energy prices driven by the Middle East war.】

item.title: 主权财富基金押注将新墨西哥沙漠打造为高科技中心
item.description:
该州700亿美元的石油基金正寻求从风险资本对美国国防、核聚变及先进制造业的投资中获取回报。【原文：

The state’s $70 billion oil fund wants to reap the rewards from venture capital’s bet on defense, nuclear fusion and advanced manufacturing in America.

】

item.title: Meta正准备部署四款自主研发的新芯片以处理人工智能任务
item.description: Meta Platforms公司计划在2027年底前部署四代新一代自研人工智能芯片，该公司正转向定制芯片以支持其快速扩张的人工智能工作负载。【原文：Meta Platforms Inc. plans to deploy four new generations of its in-house artificial intelligence chips by the end of 2027 as the company turns to custom silicon to help power its rapidly expanding AI workloads.】

item.title: 央行考虑调整稳定币上限，回应行业反对声浪
item.description: 英格兰银行副行长莎拉·布里登暗示，英国监管机构可能放宽对稳定币持仓限制的相对严格立场，此举引发了数字资产行业的强烈反对。【原文：Bank of England Deputy Governor Sarah Breeden hinted that UK regulators may soften their relatively strict approach to limits on stablecoin holdings which sparked a backlash from the digital asset industry.】

item.title: 欧佩克数据显示沙特在战争前大幅增产
item.description: 沙特阿拉伯告知欧佩克，该国上月原油产量较中东冲突爆发前提升约8%，该组织数据显示。【原文：Saudi Arabia told OPEC it ramped up crude production last month by roughly 8% ahead of the conflict in the Middle East, data from the group showed.】

item.title: 咖啡价格维持历史高位 尽管咖啡豆市场价格下跌
item.description: 尽管咖啡豆大宗商品市场价格大幅下跌，但创纪录的高价短期内不会回落——这表明供应链紊乱对食品价格的冲击可能持续多久。【原文：Record coffee prices aren’t easing anytime soon despite a sharp drop in the commodity market for beans — a sign of how long supply chain snarls can upend food prices.】

item.title: 美国2月CPI报告核心要点
item.description: 以下是周三发布的美国2月消费者价格指数报告中的关键要点：【原文：Here are key takeaways from the US February consumer price index report released Wednesday:】

item.title: 高盛分析师弗拉德认为股市存在"极端"反弹潜力
item.description: 高盛集团交易部门指出，对冲基金在美国股市的布局已为股价在近期震荡后大幅攀升奠定基础。【原文：Hedge fund positioning across US equities has created a setup for stocks to rip higher after their recent wobble, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s trading desk.】

item.title: Grubhub将开展为期三个月的限时无人机送餐测试
item.description: Grubhub将首次测试外卖订单的无人机配送服务，这标志着该公司最新尝试自动化技术的举措。【原文：Grubhub will test drone delivery of takeout orders for the first time, marking the latest effort from the company to experiment with automation technologies.】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡追踪：伊朗超大型油轮及与中国有关联的船舶穿越波斯湾
item.description: 尽管主流西方船运仍基本暂停通过霍尔木兹海峡，但近期24小时监测显示，与伊朗相关的航运活动略有增加，特别是两艘受制裁的超大型油轮（VLCC）的活动。【原文：While mainstream Western shipping remains largely suspended through the Strait of Hormuz, recent 24-hour observations reveal a slight increase in Iran-linked traffic, specifically involving two sanctioned VLCCs.】

item.title: 甲骨文公司强劲财报后信用风险降至一个月低点
item.description: 甲骨文公司周三公布季度财报后，投资者对人工智能相关资本支出的担忧有所缓解，该公司一项关键信用风险指标录得2月2日以来最大涨幅。【原文：A key gauge of Oracle Corp.’s credit risk improved the most since Feb. 2 on Wednesday, after the database giant’s quarterly report helped ease investor fears about AI-related capital spending.】

item.title: Salesforce启动八部分美国高级债券发行
item.description: Salesforce公司启动了自2021年以来首次在美国发行的投资级债券，用于回购股票，此举将检验投资者对软件行业债务的兴趣。【原文：Salesforce Inc. kicked off its first US investment-grade bond sale since 2021 to fund a share buyback, testing investor appetite for software-sector debt.】

item.title: 美国核心通胀率如预期放缓，伊朗战争前夕
item.description: 美国2月份核心通胀率较上月有所放缓，在与伊朗开战前缓解了部分价格压力。【原文：Underlying US inflation slowed in February from a month earlier, offering some relief from price pressures before the war with Iran.】

item.title: 债券交易员趁机买入遭抛售重创的英国国债
item.description: 自中东冲突爆发以来，英国债券遭遇剧烈抛售，这对少数敢于承受波动的投资者而言，恰是绝佳的买入良机。【原文：A dramatic selloff in the UK’s bonds since conflict broke out in the Middle East is a buying opportunity for a handful of investors willing to brave the volatility.】

item.title: 莫斯科互联网中断事件考验俄罗斯不断扩大的网络管控
item.description: 俄罗斯首都正遭遇大范围移动互联网中断，当局似乎正在测试对该国网络基础设施的进一步管控措施。【原文：Russia’s capital has been facing widespread mobile internet outages, as authorities appear to be testing further controls over the country’s web infrastructure.】

item.title: 瑞典因地缘政治担忧加剧下调2026年经济增长预期
item.description: 瑞典政府预测称，由于中东战争导致家庭消费更加谨慎，今年该国经济复苏速度可能低于此前预期。【原文：Sweden’s economic rebound will likely be slower this year than expected earlier as the war in the Middle East makes households more wary, according to a government forecast.】

item.title: 美国盘前活跃股：AeroVironment、金宝汤、耐克、甲骨文
item.description: 截至纽约时间上午7点58分，标普500指数期货下跌约0.1%。据知情人士透露，国际能源署正考虑释放紧急石油储备，这将是该机构历史上规模最大的一次。【原文：S&P 500 Index futures are down about 0.1% as of 7:58 a.m. in New York. The International Energy Agency is considering a release of emergency oil reserves that would be the largest-ever in its history, according to a person familiar with the matter.】
